name: opencode-openwebui-auth
description: opencode plugin that routes chat completions through an OpenWebUI instance using a user JWT

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/bundle.js --target=node --format=esm && bun build src/cli.ts --outfile dist/cli.js --target=node --format=esm
scripts.build:bundle: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/bundle.js --target=node --format=esm && bun build src/cli.ts --outfile dist/cli.js --target=node --format=esm
